non_compliance_flags.message: Max UGR 17.5 exceeds drawing-office limit 16 per BS EN 12464-1 Table 5.3 row 5.34. General-office UGR-class opal panels (≤19) used in drawing-office context that requires UGR-class-rated luminaires with batwing/asymmetric distribution (UGR ≤16). Substitute luminaire selection.
non_compliance_flags.reference: BS EN 12464-1:2021 Table 5.3 row 5.34 (drawing-office UGR limit) + CIE 117 (UGR method)
